label: Highlight my message
description: Pin your next chat message to the top for everyone.

label: Unlock a random emote
description: Add a surprise emote to your picker for this session.

label: Request a topic
description: Drop a suggestion the creator will see in their queue.

label: Get a shout-out
description: Mock a creator shout-out in chat.

label: VIP for a day
description: Temporarily show a VIP badge next to your name.
